full_text:
Liu Xian (Shizong) 劉先 (始宗)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Xian (劉先), styledShizong (始宗), was born in Lingling. Served under Liu Cong with Deng Yi. Surrendered to Cao Cao after Cong’s death. Liu Xian was affiliated with Liu Biao and the Wei Kingdom.
